name: Kento Sugiyama
description: A community-oriented flood information system for browser-based watershed exploration, inundation mapping, and impact analysis built on national hydrologic datasets.

description: Planelooly is a game about connecting airports, and it hopes to teach players about geography and the air travel industry.

name: Tony Yilmaz
description: Daisy organizes large groups by making communication simple, clear, and consistent.

name: Arav Gandhi
description: A playful version of poker where players compete against an AI opponent without real stakes, offering a low-risk outlet that supports mental well-being.

name: Corbin Craig and Connor Craig
description: AI-powered platform that monitors cognitive, behavioral, and physiological patterns to help caregivers track and support individuals with dementia.

description: A real-time, low-cost AI system that detects potential gun threats in schools using both audio and video analysis to enable faster emergency response.

name: Shivaj Raman
description: A financial literacy app that helps people learn about finances and how to trade on the stock market using lessons, tutorials, and simulations.

name: Diya Ramakrishnan
description: A surgical AI tool that guides pancreatic surgeons through pre-operative planning and real-time mixed-reality organ detection.

name: Gavin Vernon and Michael Zhang
description: Tracks Congressional data in real-time, allowing students to view summaries of current bills and interact with them.

description: A computer vision application that integrates OCR, color detection, and text recognition to assist visually impaired individuals.

name: Adel Sisy
description: A computational framework integrating disease, protein sequence, structure, and mutation data for therapeutic discovery.

description: Project Rush connects high school students with local volunteer opportunities, bringing discovery, hour tracking, achievements, and leaderboards together.

description: A real-time carcinogenic particulate tracking system and educational platform designed to protect communities affected by wildfire smoke.

description: A study app that helps middle and high school students with focus timers, task lists, and a safe AI tutor.

description: An AI research tool that helps researchers and students find answers based on scientific literature.

description: A comprehensive financial literacy app that builds personal finance skills from the ground up through courses, quizzes, and interactive tools.

description: Puerto Rico's all-in-one elderly care platform centralizing resources on services, benefits, legal rights, digital safety, and health.

description: A segmentation model-based automatic cell quantification tool that provides cell count, confluency, and viability assessment from microscopy images.

description: A calendar coordination SaaS platform that synchronizes Google Calendars across groups and schedules meetings with a single click.

description: A user-friendly platform designed to teach individuals the fundamentals and applications of reinforcement learning through hands-on resources.

description: Precision Medicine for Every Patient
